hero.sub: Accept, send, and reconcile payments globally with one modern platform built for growing teams.

features.title: Powerful payment solutions for your business

managePayments.title: Manage Payments
managePayments.desc: Centralize cards, bank transfers, and wallets with real-time visibility.

checkout.title: Checkout & Withdraw
checkout.desc: Frictionless checkout for customers and fast payouts to your team.

massPayouts.title: Mass Payouts
massPayouts.desc: Pay thousands of recipients in one batch with automated reconciliation.

invoices.title: Payment Links & Invoices
invoices.desc: Share branded links and professional invoices that get paid faster.

api.title: API Integration
api.desc: Developer-friendly APIs, webhooks, and SDKs to embed payments anywhere.

tracking.title: Transaction Tracking
tracking.desc: Search, filter, and export every movement with audit-ready logs.

flex.title: Flexibility to grow with your business
flex.point1Desc: Start simple and add markets, currencies, and payout rails as you expand.
flex.point2Desc: Live dashboards and exports keep finance and operations aligned.

pricing.title: Transparent and affordable pricing
pricing.tier1Desc: Ideal for steady volume with predictable cash flow and mid-tier balances.
pricing.tier2Desc: Simple percentage pricing on deposits—no hidden monthly minimums.
pricing.tier3Desc: Reduced fees for high-value transfers and treasury-style movements.

contact.title: Contact our support team
contact.sub: Feel free to reach out to us for any help.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I create an account?
faq.a1: Click Sign Up, complete verification, and you can start accepting payments in minutes.
faq.a2: Fees depend on your plan and volume. See pricing above or contact sales for enterprise rates.
faq.a3: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption, PCI-compliant infrastructure, and continuous monitoring.

cta.title: Take your business to the next level
